result.summary: Cloudmersive exposes multiple HTTPS REST APIs (Virus Scan, Security Threat Detection, Convert, OCR, Validate, Spam Detection, Phishing Detection, DLP, and Fraud Detection) authenticated by a Cloudmersive API key sent in the `Apikey` header, plus an MCP server at `https://cloudmersive.com/mcp-server` that uses an API key in the `api-key` header.

cloudmersive_api_key.label: Cloudmersive API key
cloudmersive_api_key.setup: Create a Cloudmersive account at [Sign Up](https://portal.cloudmersive.com/signup.aspx) or log in at [Login](https://portal.cloudmersive.com/login.aspx), then open the Cloudmersive API docs or API Console and use your account’s API key for requests. The docs show the key is sent in the `Apikey` request header. Free accounts get 600 API calls/month.
